overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city alley at night. The camera moves through a narrow corridor with massive digital billboards overhead, transitions through an enclosed industrial tunnel with ventilation fans, and emerges into an open urban intersection. The scene features vibrant pink and red neon lighting with wet reflective asphalt surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with overhead digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit alley, observing the large digital displays overhead

entered.detail: massive overhead screen displaying a stylized face in pink and white tones
continuous horizontal pink neon light strip running along the left wall
dark metal industrial building with grid-patterned windows and red accent lighting
wet asphalt surface reflecting the pink and red neon lights

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow cyberpunk alley illuminated by vibrant pink neon strips and massive overhead digital billboards. The wet asphalt mirrors the colorful lights while industrial metal buildings line the right side, creating an immersive neon-noir atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed industrial tunnel with ventilation fans

events.description: ceiling closes in transitioning from open sky corridor to fully enclosed industrial tunnel with large ventilation fans

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the curving tunnel, passing under large industrial ventilation fans

entered.detail: large circular metal ventilation fans mounted on the tunnel ceiling
smooth dark metal walls replacing the previous open sky view
illuminated vending machine with glowing display on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The alley transitions into a fully enclosed industrial tunnel with massive ceiling fans and darker, more confined lighting. The path curves gently to the right as steam emits from vents on the left, creating a moody, industrial atmosphere distinct from the open corridor.

events.description: exits enclosed tunnel into open urban intersection with traffic lights and street signage

agents.ego_description: emerging from the tunnel into the open street, approaching a pedestrian crosswalk

entered.detail: illuminated traffic signal showing red light at the intersection
various illuminated signs and billboards visible in the open urban space
tall commercial structures with lit windows and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into a wide open urban intersection at night. Traffic lights and street signs become visible as the camera emerges from the enclosed corridor into the expansive city street, with the night sky now fully visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-drenched alleyway through a confined industrial passage and out into a sprawling urban intersection. It begins by gliding through a corridor of vibrant pink neon strips and massive overhead billboards, where the wet asphalt mirrors the colorful glow of the surrounding metal buildings. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a fully enclosed industrial tunnel characterized by darker lighting, massive ceiling fans, and steam emitting from side vents. The camera then curves gently to the right, moving through the moody enclosure before finally emerging from the tunnel into the expansive openness of a city street. The environment opens up completely to reveal traffic lights, street signs, and the vast night sky overhead.
